name: Bentley Systems, Incorporated
description: Bentley Systems, Incorporated is an infrastructure engineering software company. The company provides software solutions for enterprises and professionals for the design, construction, and operations of roads and bridges, rail and transit, water and wastewater, public works and utilities, buildings and campuses, mining, and industrial facilities. Its software offerings include MicroStation-based applications for modeling and simulation, ProjectWise for project delivery, AssetWise for asset and network performance, Seequent for geoprofessional software, and the iTwin platform for infrastructure digital twins.
